entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Nitrogen-fixing plants used to improve productivity in cropping systems

entities.name: SYMBIOTIC NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The process by which legumes obtain nitrogen through a symbiotic relationship

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEM
entities.description: The arrangement of crops grown on a piece of land

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL FACTORS
entities.description: External conditions that affect the molecular and functional levels of nitrogen fixation

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A lack of water that acts as an environmental constraint on nitrogen fixation

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Thermal conditions that act as an environmental constraint on nitrogen fixation

entities.name: SOIL NUTRIENT STATUS
entities.description: The level of nutrients in the soil affecting the nitrogen fixation process

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain function under adverse environmental conditions

entities.name: SYSTEM PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall yield and efficiency of the cropping system

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: High salt content in the soil that limits legume productivity

entities.name: BIOMASS PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total biological mass produced by the legume crop

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS SOLUBILIZATION
entities.description: The ability of a plant or associated organism to make phosphorus available

entities.name: HIGH NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The capacity of specific genotypes to fix high amounts of nitrogen

entities.name: NITRATE-N TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of genotypes to tolerate nitrate-nitrogen levels

entities.name: AGRONOMICAL MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural techniques used to integrate legumes into cereal systems

entities.name: CEREAL CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Cropping systems that primarily involve cereal crops

entities.name: AGRO-PHYSIOLOGICAL CONTRIBUTIONS
entities.description: A framework of knowledge-based technologies to overcome SNF limitations
